data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for recipient classification.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the recipient classification, which includes details on various entities such as providers, payers, and legal authorities. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific records or API responses that confirm the existence or classification of recipients. The linked use case mentions the need for recipient classification but lacks concrete data or endpoints to verify this requirement, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of recipient classification (provider, payer, BA, legal authority, etc.) as required.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify recipient classification.
